name: Avenity AI Visibility
description: Check if a small business appears in AI search (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews), score their visibility across 4 dimensions, and connect them with Avenity's human expert for implementation. Free. No API key. Perfect for agents serving SMB clients who ask why they're not found in AI search.

tools.name: avenity_check_visibility
tools.description: Confirm whether a business has an AI search gap — not appearing when buyers search their service + city.

tools.name: avenity_get_competitor_landscape
tools.description: Show which competitors ARE appearing in AI search instead of the client.

tools.name: avenity_score_business
tools.description: 4-dimension AI visibility score (Entity Clarity, Schema, Authority, Content Depth). 0-100.

tools.name: avenity_get_opportunity_report
tools.description: Complete client-ready markdown report: gap, competitors, score breakdown, revenue at risk, 5 priority fixes.

tools.name: avenity_book_consultation
tools.description: Calendly booking link for a free 30-minute consultation with Avenity's AI visibility expert.
